rulings.Case Title: THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT VS. GILBERTO CORDOVA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 1, 2021 line 1. PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is OFF CALENDAR, Matter reported settled by Plaintiff's counsel on January 28, 2021. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL SLADE VS. JEREMY GARDNER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 1, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANT KINNARD HOCKENHULL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and show that the no-sublet provision (or the lease) are void an unenforceable in their entirety due to existence of one unenforceable clause. No authority is cited for this proposition. Neither the SFRO nor the Regulations purport to invalidate leases. Moving party further failed to show that a subtenant/non-signatory to the Lease is entitled to possession notwithstanding the tenant/signatory's violation of the lease subletting provisions. Additionally, there exist a triable issue of fact as to the landlord's dominant motive. =(501/CFH)
